PVPLUS.settings.enabled.name: Use Player Vision Plus
PVPLUS.settings.enabled.hint: Personal player opt-in. This only has an effect if the GM/world setting also allows Player Vision Plus.
PVPLUS.settings.sharePartyVision.name: Share greyed vision between players
PVPLUS.settings.sharePartyVision.hint: If enabled, player clients also include other tokens owned by any non-GM player. If disabled, only tokens controlled by the current player are used.
PVPLUS.settings.debug.name: Debug logging
PVPLUS.settings.debug.hint: Log vision-source decisions to the browser console.
PVPLUS.settings.worldEnabled.name: Enable Player Vision Plus for players
PVPLUS.settings.worldEnabled.hint: GM/world maximum. Player Vision Plus only works for a player if this is enabled and the player also enables their personal setting.
PVPLUS.menu.playerSettings.name: Player Vision Plus
PVPLUS.menu.playerSettings.label: Configure
PVPLUS.menu.playerSettings.hint: Personal player setting for Player Vision Plus. The GM/world setting still acts as the maximum.
PVPLUS.menu.playerSettings.title: Player Vision Plus
PVPLUS.menu.playerSettings.statusActive: Active for this client. The GM allows Player Vision Plus and your personal opt-in is enabled.
PVPLUS.menu.playerSettings.statusUserOff: Inactive for this client because your personal opt-in is disabled.
PVPLUS.menu.playerSettings.statusWorldOf: Inactive because the GM/world setting does not currently allow Player Vision Plus.
PVPLUS.menu.playerSettings.statusInactiv: Inactive: Player Vision Plus is not active for this client.
PVPLUS.menu.playerSettings.statusOwnedOn: Active: Owned characters/tokens can be used as secondary vision sources.
PVPLUS.menu.playerSettings.statusAlliedO: Active: Owned characters/tokens and other players' tokens can be used as secondary vision sources.
PVPLUS.menu.playerSettings.statusInactiv: Inactive: Off when either the GM/world cap or your personal opt-in is disabled.
PVPLUS.menu.playerSettings.statusOwnedOn: Owned Characters only: Active, but party sharing is off; only your own tokens count as secondary vision sources.
PVPLUS.menu.playerSettings.statusAlliedO: Also allied owned: Active and party sharing is on; tokens owned by other non-GM players also count as secondary vision sources.
